---
title: "Data Visualization and Information Design"
listing:
  id: data-viz-projects
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: [date]
  page-size: 36
#   include:
#     author: "{Harlow,Tristan}*"
---
